titles.title: シノアリス 一番最後のモノガタリ

data.title: SINoALICE: Ichiban Saigo no Monogatari
data.title_japanese: シノアリス 一番最後のモノガタリ
data.synopsis:
Alice's life has been miserable ever since she started playing SINoALICE. In despair at the world, she takes her own life, but wakes up and finds herself within the game, interacting with the game's navigator characters Parrah and Noya, who throw every despair of her previous life at her. As Parrah and Noya take Alice away, the game's characters plan to face the two.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: Shi Wangzhe A? 3rd Season: Youqiubiying Xingzhi Dui
是王者啊？第3季 有求必应星之队

data.title: Shi Wangzhe A? 3rd Season
title_synonyms: Shi Wangzhe A? 3rd Season: Youqiubiying Xingzhi Dui
是王者啊？第3季 有求必应星之队
data.synopsis:
Let's traverse the desert in the clouds together, heading to the starting point of heroes' dreams: Jixia Academy! After the Return to the Void Dream Performance, Yao, the passionate and somewhat eccentric captain of the Star Team, didn't want the team to disband. He wanted to continue engaging in team activities at school to strengthen team cohesion, and he came up with a brilliant idea… to accept various requests during their spare time. 

In the process of solving one bizarre incident after another, the members of the Star Team deepened their bonds. The Star Team officially became the "Always-Awaited Star Team"—"The Star Team is on the move, and it's done in no time!"

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: 青の祓魔師 終夜篇
Blue Exorcist: The Blue Night Saga

data.title: Ao no Exorcist: Yosuga-hen
data.title_english: Blue Exorcist: The Blue Night Saga
data.title_japanese: 青の祓魔師 終夜篇
data.synopsis:
Unlike his twin brother, Yukio, Rin Okumura never wished to know about their parents and the circumstances surrounding his own birth. Yet the master of time, Mephisto Pheles, gives Rin a key that transports him 40 years into the past when his late mother, Yuri Frederick Egin, was merely a child. With Mephisto's guidance, Rin leaps through the years of Yuri's childhood and her adolescence as an exorcist-in-training.

Early on, Yuri meets Shirou Fujimoto, Rin and Yukio's adoptive father. As Rin follows Yuri and Shirou's lives, he witnesses firsthand the initial appearances of Satan, his true father, and the horrors unfolding at the True Cross Order's special Section 13. Yuri's unique connection to Satan eventually leads Rin to the truth behind the most horrific event in exorcist history and the day he and Yukio were born—the Blue Night.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Ao no Exorcist: Yosuga-hen was released on Blu-ray and DVD in two volumes from April 23, 2025, to May 28, 2025.

data.title: Kuroshitsuji: Midori no Majo-hen
data.synopsis:
Queen Victoria of England has ordered her loyal watchdog, 13-year-old Earl Ciel Phantomhive, to investigate a series of suspicious deaths in southern Germany. Across multiple villages, all the victims have one thing in common: they had entered the so-called Werewolves' Forest right before they developed strange deformities and subsequently died. The rumors put blame on a "witch's curse," the nearby villagers' firm belief based on old folklore.

Unconvinced that anything truly supernatural is at play, Ciel and his contracted demonic butler, Sebastian Michaelis—along with the rest of the Phantomhive servants—come across an isolated village in the Werewolves' Forest. Its residents are only women, hostile toward the outsiders and serving a young girl with emerald eyes and bound feet, Sieglinde "Green Witch" Sullivan. Ciel and Sebastian investigate to uncover the truth, but as they soon fall victim to the curse themselves, it appears that there is more to the local myths than meets the eye.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Zenchi-teki na Dokusha no Shiten kara
全知的な読者の視点から

data.title: Zenchi-teki na Dokusha no Shiten kara
data.title_japanese: 全知的な読者の視点から
data.synopsis:
Kim Dokja does not consider himself the protagonist of his own life. Befitting the name his parents gave him, he is a solitary person whose sole hobby is reading web novels. For over a decade, he has lived vicariously through Yoo Joonghyuk, the main character of the web novel Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse (TWSA). Through Joonghyuk, Dokja has experienced secondhand the trials of repeatedly regressing in time, in search of an end to life-threatening "scenarios" that force people to act out narratives for the amusement of god-like "Constellations."

After reading 3,149 chapters—long after all other readers lost interest—Dokja finally resigns himself to the story ending. However, he receives an enigmatic message from the author, stating that the story will soon be monetized, before his surroundings suddenly go dark. He swiftly realizes that fiction has become reality and he is now living through TWSA. Although he is the singular omniscient reader of the events yet to come, his success in the scenarios is not guaranteed—but perhaps his advantage will empower him to step into the protagonist role that never suited him before. 

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: First Line
data.synopsis:
Young animator Mito feels trapped between the demands of a difficult sequence, a tight deadline, debilitating self-doubt, and a seemingly deranged director. Sometimes the only way to get to the other side is to charge right through.

(Source: Fantasia Film Festival)
data.background: First Line was released as part of Toho's GEMSTONE Creative Label GEMNIBUS vol.1 anthology. It is the only animated film in the lineup.

data.title: San Shaonu
data.synopsis:
Qingdai, a royal umbrella's fairy, embarks on a journey with a young craftsman to prevent war after failing to guard a vengeful sword's fairy who escapes the royal pavilion.

(Source: IMDB)
data.background: Adaptation of Zuo Xiaoling's Chinese webtoon, San Shaonu Meng Tan (伞少女梦谈).

data.title: Luo Fanchen (Movie)
data.synopsis:
The Weaver Girl, having neglected her duty, was banished to the mortal realm and suffered the wrath of the stars, implicating the Cowherd and their child. Years later, Jin Feng, a descendant of the Weaver Girl who had been taken to the divine realm, returned to the mortal world to atone for his mother's sins and reclaim the stars. On his journey, he unexpectedly met Xiao Fan (Yu Lu), a girl longing to travel to the divine realm to find her mother. During their adventurous journey to find the stars, they inadvertently learned the truth about the Weaver Girl's crimes…

(Source: Douban, translated)

data.title: Luo Fanchen
data.synopsis:
This short film revolves around the theme of "mythology," based on legends of constellations and the Milky Way. It tells the story of a responsible deity who "releases stars" and his mischievous younger sister. The short film imaginatively connects weaving with celestial constellations, inheriting elements of traditional mythology while also introducing a degree of innovation.

(Source: Douban, translated)

As the driver of the Phantom Shinkalion, Ina stood in front of Taisei and the others. What was Ina doing behind the scenes of the battle with Taisei and the others?

A special edition looking back on the past from Ina's perspective.

(Source: Shinkalion Wiki)
